title: Guillaume Lessard
content:
Head of Transformation
People.ContactEmail glessard@mccarthy.ca
Guillaume is in charge of planning and executing on McCarthy Tétrault’s transformation agenda. In this capacity, he works with leaders across the organization to identify and prioritize initiatives aimed at further enhancing the firm’s market-leading services organization. In this role, Guillaume also oversees the operations and expansion of the MT>Divisions .
Guillaume is a seasoned business leader in the legal industry with expertise in operations, finance and program management. He holds a Bachelor of Commerce degree from McGill University and a MBA from Queen’s University.
